Film Festival Atlas
ABFF 2026 · Miami Beach · May 27–31
Hey, I'm Sassy — a multihyphenate creative who needed a better way to move through a film festival. So I built one. Use this to plan your schedule, map your looks, and never forget the name of the person you just met. If you see me in Miami, come say hi — then open your Connections tab and add me. That's exactly what it's for.
— Nicole "Sassy" Harrison  ·  @sassyfrizzle
Browse the full ABFF schedule  ·  Tap to add events to your personal atlas  ·  Log connections with photos  ·  Plan your looks

Your ABFF Atlas
Miami Beach · May 27–31, 2026
How it works
1
Browse the full schedule and tap "Add to my atlas" on events you want to attend
2
Your personal itinerary lives in "My Atlas" — clean, day by day, just your picks
3
Log connections with a photo, plan your looks, and check off your packing list

https://sassyfrizzle.github.io/SassysABFF/FilmFestivalAtlas_ABFF2026.html
Film Festival Atlas is an independent tool created by Nicole "Sassy" Harrison (@sassyfrizzle). It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the American Black Film Festival (ABFF), ABFF Ventures LLC, or any of its partners or sponsors. All festival event information is sourced from publicly available ABFF schedule data and is subject to change — always verify times and locations at abff.com.
